SEARCH
Module overrungl.opengl
Package overrungl.opengl

Interface GL13C

All Superinterfaces:
overrun.marshal.DirectAccess
All Known Subinterfaces:
GL, GLLegacy
public interface GL13C extends overrun.marshal.DirectAccess
The OpenGL 1.3 forward compatible functions.

These extensions are promoted in this version:

  • GL_ARB_multisample
  • GL_ARB_multitexture
  • GL_ARB_texture_border_clamp
  • GL_ARB_texture_compression
  • GL_ARB_texture_cube_map
Since:
0.1.0
Author:
squid233
